AdditionalAttributes.description:
Sunbites Crackers with Quinoa Sour Cream & Chives, Cheddar & Chives and Sea Salt is made with natural ingredients. Packed with 65% wholegrains.

When you're running on empty, you can't be yourself. So Sunbites, The Good Fuel Co., is on a mission to fuel Australians with the wholegrain goodness you need to be at your best, every day, so you can put good back into the world. That's why we've created the Sunbites Good Fuel Fund - devoted to fueling local heroes and the charities they so tirelessly support.

Scan the QR Code to find out more

#Sunbites #GoodFuelFund.

Delicious and good fuel
More than 65% wholegrain
Made with natural ingredients
116 calories or less per serve
Natural colours and flavours
Proudly Australian made

Simple Goodness, Trusted Quality
Proudly gluten-free, Sakata Stars contain no artificial colours, no added preservatives, and no added MSG. With the same crisp texture Aussies know and love, they’re a wholesome choice for any occasion.

Snacking Made Easy
Perfect for lunchboxes, quick breaks at work, or sharing with friends, these rice crackers are a convenient savoury bite that fits effortlessly into your day.

Individually Wrapped for Freshness
With 12 single-serve packs inside each multipack, Sakata Stars make portion control simple and keep your crackers fresh wherever you go.

Savour the freshness of Australian-grown baby spinach in Woolworths Baby Spinach 280g pack. Featuring delicate baby spinach leaves, this larger pack is ideal for salads, soups and family meals. Rich in iron and with an earthy flavour, baby spinach is a tasty and healthy addition to all kinds of dishes.

For a pesto with a twist, replace basil leaves with Woolworths Baby Spinach. Simply add baby spinach leaves to a blender or food processor with olive oil, parmesan cheese, garlic, lemon zest, and toasted pine nuts, and blitz.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Baby Leaf Spinach offers tender, vibrant green leaves, pre-washed and ready to use. This convenient choice provides a mild, earthy flavour, perfect for adding freshness and a serving of vegetables.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select packs with vibrant green, crisp leaves, avoiding yellowed or wilted ones. Ensure packaging is intact and free from excess moisture.

</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy raw in salads, sandwiches, or wraps. Blend into smoothies. Add to pasta, stir-fries, or omelettes.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Keep refrigerated in original packaging. Consume within a few days for optimal freshness. Seal the pack well to maintain crispness.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Lightly sauté, steam, wilt, or stir-fry for quick additions. Excellent baked into quiches or frittatas.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
A Multipack of Fan-favourites!We’ve gathered all of our most popular potato chip varieties into one convenient Snack Mix Variety Multipack that is sure to offer everybody’s favourite flavour sensation. After selecting only the best Australian-grown produce, we slice, cook and season them to produce the highest quality potato and corn chips that have become synonymous with Aussie gatherings. Then it’s just a matter of adding the classic flavours you’ve grown up with and make them readily available in one place.

Perfect as Lunchbox Snacks
The Smith's Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack is ideal for those on-the-go looking for lip-smacking snacks. With the huge potato chip variety awaiting you inside, the multipack offers the perfect school lunch snacks for even the pickiest eaters. Even the big kids can enjoy Smith’s as a lunchtime snack at their desk during office hours, or even when the kids aren’t looking!

Craving Crunching Chips Ready for Any Occasion
If you’re trying to find the ultimate crowd-pleaser for your next event, the Smith's Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack will satisfy the cravings of all your family and friends. They’re the perfect mixed snacks to bring along to your next outdoor activity when the going gets tough, or as a little treat during the quiet hours of a holiday gathering.

Australian Snack Roulette
Pick out your favourite flavour in Smith’s Multipack, or play Australian Snack Roulette by closing your eyes and taking a gamble. Bring some excitement to your snack time by putting your tastebud’s fate into the hands of chance! Don’t hesitate, step on up to Smith’s own wheel of fortune.

A Huge Potato Chips Variety
Each Snack Mix contains:
- 5 x Grain Waves Sour Cream & Chives Flavoured Wholegrain Chips
- 5 x Smith's Original Crinkle Cut Potato Chips
- 5 x Doritos Cheese Supreme Flavoured Corn Chips
- 5 x Twisties Cheese Flavoured Snacks


Snack time choices just became harder with the delicious flavours competing for your attention in Smith’s Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack.

Made in Australia from only the best ingredients, and cooked to crispy perfection.

At only 106 calories or less per serving, you can eat away to your heart’s content.

Take a walk on the wild side by spinning the wheel and letting fate choose what your Smith’s flavour of the day is.

They’re the perfect mixed snacks to bring along to your next outdoor activity or holiday gathering.

Our multipack offers the perfect school lunch snacks for even the pickiest eaters.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Wholegrain Snacks Made to Be Wholesome
The bite-sized, crunchy wholegrain snacks of Sunbites Grainwaves Chips Multipack of 8 Sour Cream & Chives 176g are a wholesome treat you can always look forward to. When you stock up on these sour cream and chives chips, not only do you get to taste a brilliant flavour combo, but you also get to enjoy the unique crunch of Grainwaves curvy chips. We fuel the good in ourselves by choosing wholesome snacks.

No Added Surprises
Sunbites Grainwaves prides itself on not hiding any hidden nasties in our wholegrain chips. Every chip is Australian-made to be as natural as possible. This means that not only are Sunbites chips suitable for vegetarians, but there are also no artificial flavours, no artificial colour, and no artificial preservatives.

Platter Up to Not Strike Out at Snack Time
The 8 portions of this multipack means it's easy to share around the delightful taste of sour cream and chives chips. Make them your home's go-to lunchbox snacks during the week, or as a convenient option when on the go. You can even save up the entirety of the multipack chips to platter up the next time you have friends over. After all, it's hard to resist any snack when it's served up so nicely.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Want to make a difference and reduce food waste? The Odd Bunch Carrots are a delicious and versatile solution for your everyday meals. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>The Odd Bunch Carrots are Australian-grown, offering flavourful carrots with natural sweetness and crunch. These versatile carrots may look unique, but are perfect for many meals, helping reduce food waste.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, crisp, bright orange carrots. Minor imperfections are normal for The Odd Bunch, not affecting taste.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy raw as snacks, in salads, or cooked in stir-fries, roasts, and stews. Great in sweet treats like carrot cake.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in the refrigerator, ideally in a plastic bag, to maintain freshness for up to two weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, braise, microwave, roast, steam, stew, stir-fry.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Available year-round, these carrots are proudly grown in Australia.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Fresh Pink Lady Apples deliver a sweet and tangy flavour with a crisp, juicy bite. These vibrant apples are a popular snack, with one apple counting as one serve of fruit. They are also versatile for many culinary uses.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select firm apples that feel heavy for their size, with smooth skin and an even red blush. Avoid any soft spots or bruising.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh as a crunchy snack, sliced in salads, or added to lunchboxes. They are great baked into pies, crumbles, or simmered in savoury dishes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Pink Lady Apples in your refrigerator's crisper drawer. This helps maintain their crispness and flavour for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, roast, sauté.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care by Australian farmers.</section>
